summary: Entitlement Projection Engine V1 testing complete. All acceptance criteria PASSED: (1) GET /api/onboarding/plans returns plan catalog with limits and usage_allowances for starter/pro/enterprise, (2) GET /api/admin/tenants/{tenant_id}/features returns entitlement projection with all canonical fields including plan_catalog, (3) PATCH /api/admin/tenants/{tenant_id}/plan updates and returns correct limits for selected plan, (4) PATCH /api/admin/tenants/{tenant_id}/add-ons preserves effective features and entitlement payload shape, (5) GET /api/tenant/features and /entitlements return canonical projection for current tenant, (6) Pricing page /pricing renders limits and usage allowances from backend plan catalog (not blank), (7) Admin tenant-features page loads, tenant selection works, entitlement overview card renders with limits/usage, save plan change succeeds with toast confirmation.

minor.issue: Console shows some 400/500 errors on page load (possibly unrelated background requests), but tested entitlement endpoints all work correctly

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/onboarding/plans returns 200 with plans array
✅ Plan catalog includes starter, pro, enterprise plans
✅ Each plan has limits and usage_allowances objects
✅ Starter plan has users.active=2, reservations.monthly=100
✅ Pro plan has users.active=10, reservations.monthly=null (unlimited)
✅ Each plan has features array with feature keys
✅ GET /api/admin/tenants returns tenant list
✅ GET /api/admin/tenants/{id}/features returns entitlement projection with plan, plan_label, limits, usage_allowances, plan_catalog
✅ PATCH /api/admin/tenants/{id}/plan updates plan and returns correct limits for new plan
✅ PATCH /api/admin/tenants/{id}/add-ons preserves entitlement payload shape with all fields
✅ GET /api/tenant/features returns canonical projection for current tenant
✅ GET /api/tenant/entitlements is alias for /features, returns same data
✅ Invalid plan returns 422 with proper error
✅ Invalid add-on returns 422 with proper error
✅ Pricing page loads at /pricing with all 3 plan cards
✅ Pricing page shows limits section (Aktif kullanıcı: 2/10/Sınırsız)
✅ Pricing page shows usage allowances section from backend data
✅ Pricing page billing cycle toggle (Aylık/Yıllık) works
✅ Admin tenant-features page loads at /app/admin/tenant-features
✅ Admin page shows tenant list with search
✅ Admin page tenant selection loads entitlement detail view
✅ TenantEntitlementOverview card renders plan label, source, limits, usage allowances
✅ Admin page plan dropdown shows all 3 plans with module counts
✅ Admin page save plan change succeeds with toast 'Özellikler güncellendi'
critical_code_review_comments: entitlement_service.py: _serialize_projection() correctly builds canonical shape with all required fields
entitlement_service.py: get_plan_catalog() ensures default plans exist via ensure_default_plan_catalog()
entitlement_service.py: project_tenant_entitlements() correctly merges plan features with add-ons
admin_tenant_features.py: All PATCH endpoints return consistent entitlement projection shape
tenant_features.py: /features and /entitlements endpoints share same implementation
onboarding.py: /plans endpoint correctly returns plan catalog from entitlement_service
PricingPage.jsx: Correctly fetches from /api/onboarding/plans and renders limits + usage_allowances
AdminTenantFeaturesPage.jsx: Correctly fetches /api/admin/tenants/{id}/features and uses TenantEntitlementOverview component
TenantEntitlementOverview.jsx: Correctly renders limits and usage allowances using entitlementLabels helpers
entitlementLabels.js: formatEntitlementValue() correctly handles null as 'Sınırsız'
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing 'Varsayilan Tenant'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Entitlement Projection Engine V1 is complete and tested. Key components: (1) entitlement_service.py handles plan catalog + tenant entitlement projection, (2) plan_matrix.py defines starter/pro/enterprise with features/limits/quotas, (3) admin_tenant_features.py provides CRUD for tenant plan + add-ons, (4) tenant_features.py provides self-service entitlement access, (5) PricingPage.jsx consumes /api/onboarding/plans for public pricing display, (6) AdminTenantFeaturesPage.jsx + TenantEntitlementOverview.jsx provide admin UI for entitlement management.
